predicates.name: is_legal_cohabitant_of
predicates.description: The first person is the legally cohabiting partner of the second person.

predicates.name: is_surviving_cohabitant
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving legal cohabitant of the deceased second person.

predicates.name: is_descendant_of
predicates.description: The first person is a descendant of the second person.

predicates.name: is_main_family_residence
predicates.description: The property served as the main family residence of the deceased at the time the estate opened.

predicates.name: is_household_contents_of
predicates.description: The first property represents the household contents present in the second property.

predicates.name: subject_to_legal_return_right
predicates.description: The property is subject to a right of legal return as referred to in the applicable articles.

predicates.name: is_rented_property
predicates.description: The property is held under a rental agreement.

predicates.name: donation_reserved_usufruct
predicates.description: The donor reserved the usufruct of the donated property at the time of the donation.

predicates.name: cohabitant_status_at_time_of_donation
predicates.description: The surviving person already had the status of legal cohabitant at the time of the donation.

predicates.name: donor_remained_usufruct_holder_until_death
predicates.description: The donor remained the holder of the reserved usufruct until the day of death.

predicates.name: donation_subject_property_is_main_residence
predicates.description: The property subject to the donation served as the main family residence at the time the estate opened.

predicates.name: surviving_cohabitant_renounces_usufruct
predicates.description: The surviving legal cohabitant renounces the usufruct arising from the donation provision.

predicates.name: renunciation_occurs_during_donors_lifetime
predicates.description: The renunciation of usufruct takes place during the lifetime of the donor.

predicates.name: bare_ownership_acquired_by
predicates.description: The person acquires bare ownership of the property.

predicates.name: exclusion_applies_descendant
predicates.description: The exclusion applies because the surviving legal cohabitant is a descendant of the deceased cohabitant, blocking inheritance rights under the article.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_main_residence
predicates.description: The surviving legal cohabitant acquires usufruct over the main family residence property by operation of law.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_household_contents
predicates.description: The surviving legal cohabitant acquires usufruct over the household contents by operation of law.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_from_donation
predicates.description: The surviving legal cohabitant acquires usufruct of the donated property upon the donor's death.

predicates.name: acquires_rental_right_of_main_residence
predicates.description: The surviving legal cohabitant acquires the exclusive right to the rental of the main family residence, to the exclusion of all other heirs.

predicates.name: entitled_to_inventory_of_household_contents
predicates.description: The bare owner is entitled to demand an inventory of the household contents and a statement of condition of the main residence.

predicates.name: usufruct_rules_of_surviving_spouse_apply
predicates.description: The rules on usufruct of the surviving spouse apply by analogy to the surviving legal cohabitant.
